title: FPI Severo Ochoa Fellowship
organization: Spanish Ministry of Science and Innovation / State Research Agency (AEI)
description: Highly competitive national fellowship for PhD training awarded within the Severo Ochoa Centres of Excellence programme. Included a four-year research contract, doctoral funding, and support for international research stays.

title: Master's Degree in Astrophysics Scholarship
organization: University of La Laguna / Instituto de Astrofísica de Canarias
description: Competitive scholarship covering tuition fees and providing financial support during the Master's Degree in Astrophysics.
